message:
Sync test artifacts, perf budgets, and issue tracker; add truncate_tail reproduction test

Test artifacts:
- Refreshed timestamps in conformance report, provenance verification,
  risk review, and conformance summary
- Perf budgets updated: event_dispatch_p99 41→37 µs, sustained_load
  RSS growth 1.9%→0.0%

New test (tests/reproduction_truncate.rs):
- Reproduction test for truncate_tail edge case where files ending in
  \n with small byte limits returned empty string because the trailing
  empty line consumed line_count without any bytes, blocking the partial
  fallback path (fixed in prior commit's tools.rs changes)

Beads issue tracker synced with latest closed tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
